title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs locally on computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. Available only in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans, it supports features like file organization, email summarization, calendar integration, and task scheduling.
